name: Pumpkin Mousse with Vanilla Sauce
recipeInstructions:
In a small bowl, sprinkle gelatin over cold water. Place the bowl in simmering water and stir until the gelatin is dissolved. Beat egg yolks with sugar. Stir in pumpkin, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, and dissolved gelatin. Gently fold whipped cream into the pumpkin mixture. Pour the mousse into a mold or bowl and chill thoroughly. Serve with vanilla sauce.
Serves 8
FOR THE SAUCE:
Scald milk and light cream with vanilla. In a double boiler, beat egg yolks, sugar, and pinch of salt. Gradually beat in hot milk mixture. Cook the sauce over hot water, stirring constantly until it thickens and coats a spoon. (If it does not thicken, add a little flour.) Strain the sauce to remove lumps. Chill.
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
